title: Implement Python benchmark for single vs recursive discovery
description: Add Python benchmark that measures time to index issues for single project vs recursive discovery across multiple project folders using the fixtures.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added tools/benchmark_discovery.py to benchmark single-project vs multi-project discovery/list/ready timings using deterministic fixtures. Script disables daemon, clears caches, and emits JSON. Ran: python tools/benchmark_discovery.py.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Python benchmark runs locally, prints timings for single-project and recursive modes, and uses the shared fixtures.
